title: claude-wiki-pages config
description: User (~/.config/claude-wiki-pages/config.json) and project (.claude/claude-wiki-pages.json) configuration. Created in M1; loaded and enforced in M5. Env overrides use CLAUDE_WIKI_PAGES_*.

path.description: Explicit vault path. When omitted, four-tier resolution applies (see resolve-vault.sh / core/vault.ts).

aggressiveness.description: mechanical = wikilinks/MOCs/frontmatter only; structural = + restructure/merge; aggressive = + deletions.

mode.description: How auto-heal snapshots the vault before changing it. Rollback is git revert / branch checkout.

push.description: auto = push to the configured upstream after each git-checkpointed engine op (heal/migrate/propose). Off by default — the plugin is not a hosted service.

firewall.description: Vault isolation: confine agent writes to the resolved vault (+ allowPaths), minus denyPaths.

mode.description: enforce = block out-of-vault writes; warn = advise only; off = pass-through.

allowPaths.description: Extra write roots beyond the resolved vault. Absolute paths or globs.

denyPaths.description: Globs always blocked, even inside an allowed root.

localModel.description: Optional local-model (Ollama/LM Studio) drafting into _proposed/ for human review. Off by default — Claude Code stays primary. When enabled, 'model' must be on the ADR-0011 measured allow-list (see APPROVED_LOCAL_MODELS); 'config validate' fails closed otherwise.

model.description: Local model id (e.g. qwen3-coder:30b). When localModel.enabled is true this must be a model that cleared the ADR-0011 ingest-extract quality gate (allow-list in src/data/config/config.ts; tested models in docs/local-models.md). An unproven model fails 'config validate' fail-closed.

tier.description: Capability tier: 'draft' = local model produces _proposed/ drafts only; 'ingest-extract' = local model also runs source extraction during ingest. Gated per-tier (ADR-0018): a tier with no gate-approved model is WIRED but BLOCKED.

offlinePolicy.description: Offline fallback behaviour (ADR-0018): 'strict' = fail if Claude API is unreachable; 'prefer-local' = fall back to an approved local tier when Claude is unreachable; 'off' = no local fallback, no network probe (default).

maintenance.description: Autonomous upkeep: backlog detection + the catch-up recommendation/loop.

modelHints.description: Optional per-task model hints consumed by agents (e.g. ingest, query).
